frame.background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(34,197,94,0.22), transparent 25%), radial-gradient(circle at left center, rgba(124,58,237,0.18), transparent 35%), linear-gradient(180deg, #020617 0%, #091421 45%, #050a18 100%)

stage.backgroundImage: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.04), rgba(255,255,255,0)), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(34,197,94,0.14), transparent 32%)

preQuestion.speaker: Nova
preQuestion.text: Round 2 is live. Your answers must be sharp and strategic.

preQuestion.speaker: Pulse
preQuestion.label: System check
preQuestion.text: Remember: every correct answer counts more in the final score.
preQuestion.transcript: Pay attention to the questions and watch the timer.

duringQuestion.speaker: Nova
duringQuestion.text: First one sets the pace. Choose wisely.

afterAnswer.speaker: Pulse
afterAnswer.label: Third checkpoint
afterAnswer.text: Question three complete. You're past the halfway point.
afterAnswer.transcript: Good job. Keep pushing through the second half.

finished.speaker: Nova
finished.label: Round complete
finished.text: That was Round 2. Great work — you’re one step closer to the top.
finished.transcript: Wait for the leaderboard or prepare the next round.
